findings:
# TASK-296 — Change Plan: DevSteps Delegation Boundary Enforcement

Execution order (safe, no cross-deps): CHANGE-1 → CHANGE-2 → CHANGE-3 → CHANGE-4 → CHANGE-5 → CHANGE-6.

---

## CHANGE-1 — devsteps-agent-protocol.instructions.md: Add Caller column
File: `.github/instructions/devsteps-agent-protocol.instructions.md`
OLD header row:
`| Tool                                 | Usage`
NEW: Insert `| Caller` column between Tool and Usage for every row:
- `mcp_devsteps_add` → Caller: `coord (bootstrap primary) · worker-devsteps (follow-ups)`
- `mcp_devsteps_update` → Caller: `coord (status gates + done-gate append) · worker-devsteps (desc/tags)`
- `mcp_devsteps_list` / `get` / `search` / `trace` / `status` → Caller: `coord · any agent`
- `mcp_devsteps_link` → Caller: `worker-devsteps ONLY`
- `write_mandate_result` → Caller: `analyst-* · exec-*`
- `read_mandate_results` → Caller: `coord ONLY`
- `write_analysis_report` → Caller: `aspect-* · analyst-*`
- `write_escalation` → Caller: `any agent`

## CHANGE-2 — AGENT-DISPATCH-PROTOCOL.md: Add Invariant I-11
File: `.github/agents/AGENT-DISPATCH-PROTOCOL.md`
After the line `| I-10 | Web-First at STANDARD triage | Staleness aspect = MUST at STANDARD+ |` insert:
`| I-11 | coord delegates follow-up DevSteps ops to worker-devsteps | coord MAY directly call: mcp_devsteps_add (primary item bootstrap) · mcp_devsteps_update status (in-progress/review/done) · mcp_devsteps_update append_description (done-gate only). ALL other add/link/update ops MUST go via worker-devsteps. |`

## CHANGE-3 — devsteps-R4-worker-devsteps.agent.md: Explicit dispatch contract
File: `.github/agents/devsteps-R4-worker-devsteps.agent.md`
OLD Contract bullets:
`- **Dispatched by**: coord ONLY — for structured DevSteps batch operations`
`- **Responsibility**: Create, update, link DevSteps items, status transitions`
NEW:
`- **Dispatched by**: coord ONLY`
`- **Responsibility**: Create follow-up items, manage ALL link ops, mid-lifecycle description/tag updates`
After the 5 bullets, ADD two sub-tables:
**Delegatable ops (coord MUST send here):** add follow-up items · link (ALL relationship types) · update description/tags mid-lifecycle · update status on non-primary items.
**coord-Reserved (NOT delegated):** add primary item (bootstrap) · update status in-progress/review/done on primary item · update append_description at done-gate.

## CHANGE-4 — devsteps-R0-coord.agent.md: Fix mid-item direct add
File: `.github/agents/devsteps-R0-coord.agent.md`
OLD (Operational Rules bullet 2, last sentence):
`New items found mid-item: checkout main → \`devsteps/add\` → return to branch.`
NEW:
`New items found mid-item: checkout main → dispatch \`worker-devsteps\` (ops: add + link) → return to branch. **coord NEVER calls devsteps/add or devsteps/link mid-lifecycle — delegate to worker-devsteps (I-11).**`

## CHANGE-5 — devsteps-R0-coord-sprint.agent.md: Two hunks
File: `.github/agents/devsteps-R0-coord-sprint.agent.md`
Hunk A — DevSteps Integration bullet 2 last sentence:
OLD: `New items found mid-sprint: stash or finish step → checkout main → \`devsteps/add\` → return to branch.`
NEW: `New items found mid-sprint: stash or finish step → checkout main → dispatch \`worker-devsteps\` (ops: add + link) → return to branch. **coord NEVER calls devsteps/add or devsteps/link mid-lifecycle — delegate to worker-devsteps (I-11).**`
Hunk B — last bullet in DevSteps Integration:
OLD: `- New issue found → \`devsteps/search\` then \`devsteps/add\` before continuing`
NEW: `- New issue found → \`devsteps/search\` (coord may search directly) then dispatch \`worker-devsteps\` (ops: add + link) before continuing`

## CHANGE-6 — copilot-instructions.md: Two hunks
File: `.github/copilot-instructions.md`
Hunk A — Lifecycle step 2:
OLD: `2. Create item if none exists: \`mcp_devsteps_add\``
NEW: `2. Create **primary** item if none exists: \`mcp_devsteps_add\` _(bootstrap only — coord's sole permitted direct add)_`
ADD after step 8: `> **Delegation boundary (I-11):** coord calls mcp_devsteps_add ONLY in step 2 for the primary item. All follow-up items discovered mid-lifecycle MUST be delegated to worker-devsteps. All mcp_devsteps_link calls MUST be delegated to worker-devsteps.`
Hunk B — "Other agents" note:
OLD: `They NEVER create new items or change status directly — that is exclusively coord's responsibility.`
NEW: `They NEVER create new items or change lifecycle status directly — that is exclusively coord's responsibility. Exception: \`worker-devsteps\` creates follow-up items and manages all link operations as delegated by coord (never autonomously).`
recommendations: CHANGE-1: devsteps-agent-protocol.instructions.md — Add Caller column to Tool Reference table
CHANGE-2: AGENT-DISPATCH-PROTOCOL.md — Add I-11 to Dispatch Invariants after I-10 row
CHANGE-3: devsteps-R4-worker-devsteps.agent.md — Add Delegatable/Reserved op tables to Contract
CHANGE-4+5: coord.agent.md + coord-sprint.agent.md — Replace direct devsteps/add calls with worker-devsteps dispatch (3 hunks)
CHANGE-6: copilot-instructions.md — Annotate Lifecycle step 2 + delegation note + fix Other-agents note (2 hunks)
